summary: Add at least one e2e test that sends stream=True without stream_format to validate the new default SSE event path against a real TTS model.
Run at least pytest tests/e2e/online_serving/test_qwen3_tts_base.py -k test_text_to_audio_002 -v to confirm that the mechanically added stream_format='audio' works with a real server.
Update the module docstring to reflect that the test now relies on stream_format='audio' for raw PCM streaming.
Update the test_streaming docstring to clarify that raw audio streaming is achieved via stream_format='audio'.
Add a unit test for WAV SSE streaming via stream=True and response_format='wav' to cover the untested WAV SSE path.
